title: Per Audacia Ad Astra
description: Mod pack with focus on exploration and automation all in a Vanilla/Tech theme.
body:
## Per Audacia Ad Astra

A mod pack that focuses on two main aspects. Exploration and the possibility to automize processes and make your life a bit easier. The mod pack tries to resolve issues with storage through applied energetics, expand your possibilities to explore with Ad Astra and to provide you with the resources and automated processes to get all the resources you will need along your journey with create. And all that while being quite efficient and looking just like good old vanilla with some extra stuff.

## Installation
#### Client: [View Docs](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/)
#### Server: [MRPack-Install](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install) or [Using Pterodactyl with the modrinth egg](https://github.com/parkervcp/eggs/tree/master/game_eggs/minecraft/java/modrinth)

## External Mods
1. Nature's Compass: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass)
2. Create Deco: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-deco)
3. Flux Networks: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flux-networks)
4. Lootr: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lootr)
5. Botany Pots Tiers: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botany-pots-tiers)
6. CobbleForDays: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblefordays)
7. Infinite Source (Water): [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infinitewatersource)
8. Cosmetic Armor Reworked: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
